reason.description: Required commit message for this memory change. Used as the git commit message.

file_path.description: Target memory path (file or directory). Accepts relative paths like system/contacts.md or absolute paths under MEMORY_DIR

old_path.description: Source memory file path for rename operations (relative path or absolute path under MEMORY_DIR)

new_path.description: Destination memory file path for rename operations (relative path or absolute path under MEMORY_DIR)

description.description: Block description (required for create and update_description)
